title: TA5 1UD, NNB Generation Company (HPC) Limited: environmental permit variation application advertisement - EPR/JP3122GM/V013
body: "The Environment Agency consults the public on certain applications for:   waste and mining waste operations installations water discharge and groundwater activities medium combustion plant and specified generators   The arrangements are explained in their Public Participation Statement  These notices explain:   what the application is about how to view and comment on the proposed variation when you need to comment by   The Environment Agency will decide:   whether to grant or refuse the application what conditions to include in the permit (if granted)  "
